title: ibervillea guatemalensis
intro: Ibervillea guatemalensis, also known as the Mexican prickle poppy, is a plant species that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Ibervillea guatemalensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm the efficacy of these uses.
